cleavage agent: using trypsin buffer (2 μg trypsin and 50 mM NH4HCO3)
fractionation method: fractionated using high pH reverse phase HPLC
fragmentation method: followed by MS/MS using a Q ExactiveTM Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer
instrument: using a Q ExactiveTM Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: subjected to a nanoSpray ionization source
